title: Pre-op cardiac risk documentation anesthesia
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Supports documenting clinician-led cardiovascular disease and risk-factor review, use of an already completed validated risk assessment, selective testing decisions, and team-based discussion.

source.title: 2024 AHA/ACC Perioperative CV Management Guideline: Key Points
source.population: Adults undergoing noncardiac surgery with cardiovascular disease, cardiovascular risk factors, or symptoms concerning for cardiovascular disease.
source.setting: Preoperative cardiovascular assessment and perioperative planning for noncardiac surgery.
source.exclusions: Exact for a stepwise clinician-led cardiovascular risk assessment, selective testing, team-based review, and anticoagulation risk context. It does not support automatic risk scores, tests, medicine changes, bridging, or doses, and UAE pathways remain local.

exact_location.heading: Key points 1-4 - stepwise cardiovascular assessment, selective testing, and team care
